creator: alex@stangl.us
text:
Adds support for pkgng.
Incorporates -a argument suggested by Marcel Bonnet in PR 179637. Hence this supersedes PR 179637, which can now be closed.
Other misc. fixes and enhancements, including correcting typos.

Fix: 

Due to previous problems with GNATS corrupting patch, I have uploaded it here:
https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/u/6285307/portupdate-scan_0_4.diff
How-To-Repeat: Apply referenced patch to bring ports-mgmt/portupdate-scan to 0.4 version.
